name: Market Positioning Agent
description: Analyses value proposition responses for competitive differentiation strength, unmet need identification, target audience specificity, and competitor framing. Activated only in value_proposition query mode. Evaluates the council synthesis for market-positioning clarity using keyword-based scoring across four strategic dimensions.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Competitive Differentiation Analysis
skills.description: Keyword scoring for competitive positioning terms: 'differentiat', 'unique', 'superior', 'first-in-class', 'best-in-class', 'competitive advantage', 'novel'. Scores ≥3 hits = strong, 1-2 = moderate, 0 = weak.
examples: Evaluate the competitive differentiation strength in a tafamidis value proposition

skills.name: Unmet Need Assessment
skills.description: Detects unmet need articulation via keywords: 'unmet need', 'gap in', 'no current', 'lack of', 'limited option', 'inadequate'. Strong articulation (3+) vs missing (0).

skills.name: Target Audience Clarity
skills.description: Identifies audience specificity: 'cardiologist', 'oncologist', 'primary care', 'specialist', 'patient population', 'prescriber', 'payer', 'HTA'. Well-defined (3+) vs needs refinement (0).

skills.name: Competitor Framing Check
skills.description: Detects competitor references: 'competitor', 'versus', 'compared to', 'head-to-head', 'switching from', 'market share'. Good framing (2+) vs no competitive context (0).
